subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath reserved for the exaltation of His Word! Utmost joy and delight were obtained from the news of thy health and well-being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ادخره الله لاعلاء کلمته از صحت و سلامت آنجناب نهایت روح و ریحان حاصل گشت
subcodes.subjects: @importance of prayer, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @law of obligatory prayer, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant
